column1: Master switch for all frontend image optimizations (lazy loading, WebP detection, performance hints).
column2: Master switch for all frontend image optimizations (lazy loading, WebP detection, performance hints).

column1: Log image optimization activity to the browser console (disable in production).
column2: Log image optimization activity to the browser console (disable in production).

column1: Detect browser WebP support via JavaScript. When unsupported, removes WebP source elements so the browser falls back to PNG/JPG. Does NOT perform server-side conversion.
column2: Detect browser WebP support via JavaScript. When unsupported, removes WebP source elements so the browser falls back to PNG/JPG. Does NOT perform server-side conversion.

column1: When WebP is not supported, strip WebP source tags from picture elements so the browser loads the fallback image.
column2: When WebP is not supported, strip WebP source tags from picture elements so the browser loads the fallback image.

column1: Delay loading offscreen images until they approach the viewport.
column2: Delay loading offscreen images until they approach the viewport.

column1: Native: adds loading="lazy" attribute (best compatibility). Intersection Observer: JS-based with fade-in support. Hybrid: both.
column2: Native: adds loading="lazy" attribute (best compatibility). Intersection Observer: JS-based with fade-in support. Hybrid: both.

column1: Start loading images this many pixels before they enter the viewport. Only applies to Intersection Observer strategy.
column2: Start loading images this many pixels before they enter the viewport. Only applies to Intersection Observer strategy.

column1: Visual placeholder shown while an image is loading. Only applies to Intersection Observer strategy.
column2: Visual placeholder shown while an image is loading. Only applies to Intersection Observer strategy.

column1: Smoothly fade images in when they finish loading. Only applies to Intersection Observer strategy.
column2: Smoothly fade images in when they finish loading. Only applies to Intersection Observer strategy.

column1: Skip lazy loading for the first N images on the page to improve LCP (Largest Contentful Paint).
column2: Skip lazy loading for the first N images on the page to improve LCP (Largest Contentful Paint).

column1: Number of images at the top of the page to load immediately (not lazy loaded).
column2: Number of images at the top of the page to load immediately (not lazy loaded).

column1: Dynamically inject link rel="preload" tags for the first N images on the page to improve LCP.
column2: Dynamically inject link rel="preload" tags for the first N images on the page to improve LCP.

column1: Add decoding="async" to all images so the browser decodes them off the main thread.
column2: Add decoding="async" to all images so the browser decodes them off the main thread.

column1: Set fetchpriority="high" on critical images to hint the browser to download them first (Chrome 101+).
column2: Set fetchpriority="high" on critical images to hint the browser to download them first (Chrome 101+).
